amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Annex VIII — paragraph 1
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Annex VIII — paragraph 1

## Text proposed by the Commission

The following information shall be provided and thereafter kept up to date with regard to high-risk AI systems to be registered in accordance with Article 51.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

Section A - The following information shall be provided and thereafter kept up to date with regard to high-risk AI systems to be registered in accordance with Article 51 (1) .
commission_text: The following information shall be provided and thereafter kept up to date with regard to high-risk AI systems to be registered in accordance with Article 51.
parliament_text: Section A - The following information shall be provided and thereafter kept up to date with regard to high-risk AI systems to be registered in accordance with Article 51 (1) .
